title: Backchannel acknowledgement (should NOT yield)

transcript.agent: So the way the refund works is we credit the original card, and then it usually posts within a few days depending on your bank.

why_it_matters: Short acknowledgements like mhm, right, and okay are listener feedback, not a bid for the floor. An agent that yields on every backchannel becomes impossible to talk to because it stops mid-thought whenever the caller shows they are listening.
